hook.text: CASEMIRO HEADING TO MESSI'S INTER MIAMI

beats.text: ROMANO: VERBAL AGREEMENT SEALED WITH ALL PARTIES INVOLVED
THE 34-YEAR-OLD JOINS MESSI AND SUAREZ IN MIAMI
WON THE FA CUP AND LEAGUE CUP WITH UNITED
OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT COMES AFTER WORLD CUP WITH BRAZIL

caption: It's happening — Casemiro is heading to Inter Miami 🔴 Fabrizio Romano reports a verbal agreement has been sealed with all parties, with all formal steps resolved. The 34-year-old leaves Manchester United as a free agent and links up with Lionel Messi and Luis Suárez in MLS. He won the FA Cup and League Cup at Old Trafford — a genuine servant to the cause. The official announcement is expected after his World Cup duty with Brazil. Will you miss Casemiro? 👇 REPORTED — per Fabrizio Romano. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #casemiro #intermiami
